mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` ( trading_order_no, payment_status, amount, refund, is_refund, member_id, project_id, elder_id, estimated_arrival_time, mark, reason, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, remark, view_status, order_no, o_create_type ) VALUES ( #{tradingOrderNo}, #{paymentStatus}, #{amount}, #{refund}, #{isRefund}, #{memberId}, #{projectId}, #{elderId}, #{estimatedArrivalTime}, #{mark}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{remark}, #{viewStatus}, #{orderNo}, #{oCreateType} )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM `order` WHERE status = 0 AND create_time < #{time} AND view_status = '0'

SELECT o.* FROM `order` o WHERE o.view_status = '0'
AND o.status = #{status}
AND o.order_no LIKE concat('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = 4, payment_status = 3, reason = #{reason}, update_time = #{now}, update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
UPDATE `order` SET status = 4, payment_status = 3, reason = '超时自动取消', update_time = #{now} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
